app.title: RareQC — Registry Admin
app.description: Quebec registry for patients with rare diseases

home.title: Dashboard
home.description: Welcome to the registry administration portal
home.search_placeholder: Search a participant by name, first name, RAMQ, email, phone or contact

landing.title: Administration portal for managing registry participants

guide.title: User Guide
guide.description: How to use the registry administration portal
guide.nav_home_desc: Access the dashboard with quick links and recent activities. Click the RareQc logo in the navigation bar.
guide.nav_search_desc: Type at least 2 characters in the search bar to find a participant by name, RAMQ, contact email or phone.
guide.participants_list_desc: View the full list from the Participants menu. Sort by column, paginate and use the search bar to filter.
guide.participants_create_desc: Click the 'Add a participant' button at the top of the list. Fill in identity, contact information and contacts.
guide.participants_edit_desc: On the participant page, click the pencil icon in the Identity card to edit their information or contact details.
guide.contacts_add_desc: On the participant page, click the + icon in the Contacts card. Fill in the information and check 'Same coordinates' if applicable.
guide.contacts_edit_desc: Click the pencil icon next to the contact to edit.
guide.contacts_delete_desc: Click the trash icon. Contacts who signed a consent cannot be deleted (icon is greyed out).
guide.consents_add_desc: On the participant page, click + in the Consents card. Choose the template form, clause, signer and optionally upload the signed document.
guide.consents_edit_desc: Click the pencil icon next to the consent to change its status (valid, expired, withdrawn, replaced).
guide.consents_view_desc: Click the info icon to see the full clause text, status, signer and associated document.
guide.consents_download_desc: Click the download icon next to a consent that has an associated signed document.
guide.documents_upload_desc: When adding a consent, use the Upload button to attach the signed form (PDF, Word).
guide.documents_download_desc: Signed documents can be downloaded from the Consents card or from the details dialog.
guide.activity_view_desc: Access the full log from the Activities menu. Each participant page also shows its own history.
guide.activity_filter_desc: Use the dropdown to filter by action type and the search bar to search by author, participant or details.

tour.identity_content: This card displays the participant's identity (name, date of birth, RAMQ, vital status) and contact information. Click the pencil icon to edit.
tour.contacts_content: The participant's contacts are listed here (mother, father, guardian, etc.). You can add, edit or delete contacts. A contact who signed a consent cannot be deleted.
tour.consents_content: This section shows the participant's consents. Click + to add a consent, the info icon for details, the pencil to change status, or the download arrow to get the signed document.
tour.activity_content: All actions performed on this participant are recorded here: creation, modifications, contact and consent changes.

create_tour.identity_content: Enter the participant's identity: name, date of birth, sex, RAMQ number and city of birth.
create_tour.coordinates_content: Enter the participant's contact information. For minors or dependents, enter the responsible person's details.
create_tour.contacts_content: Add the participant's contacts (parent, guardian, etc.). Only one can be primary. Check 'Same coordinates' to copy the participant's address.

participants.title: Participants
participants.search_placeholder: Search by name, first name, RAMQ, email, phone or contact

create_participant.title: Add participant
create_participant.coordinates_help: For minor or dependent participants, enter the contact information of the responsible person (parent, guardian).
create_participant.contacts_help: Add the participant's contact persons. Only one contact can be designated as the primary contact (responsible for communications). Check 'Same coordinates as participant' to automatically copy the address entered above.

participant_detail.confirm_delete_contact: Are you sure you want to delete the contact {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
participant_detail.no_contacts: No contacts registered for this participant
participant_detail.cannot_delete_signer: This contact cannot be deleted because they signed a consent
participant_detail.guid_basic_desc: First name + Last name + Date of birth

admin.title: Administration
admin.file_optional_edit: leave empty to keep the current file
admin.template_cannot_edit: This form has been signed by at least one participant and cannot be edited
admin.template_cannot_delete: This form has been signed by at least one participant and cannot be deleted
admin.delete_template_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}" and all its clauses?

activity_log.search_placeholder: Search by author, participant or details
